summary: Average-quality recording of the Woodstock set, highlighted by Pigpen's marathon Turn On Your Lovelight.
review: The reviewers find this show neither a disaster nor a classic, noting that it isn’t the worst Dead ever performed and pointing out Pigpen’s 45‑minute Turn On Your Lovelight as a standout moment. The audio needs EQ tweaks and there are no clear comments on source type, suggesting only fair listenability.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers give low to neutral scores (3 stars and 0), with the main positive point being Pigpen’s long Love Light jam; recording quality is described only as needing EQ, indicating an average listening experience.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on soundboard or audience source; reviewer suggests using EQ and Windows Media Player enhancements, implying the raw audio may be flat or lacking clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is described as a long, psychedelic jam with Pigpen leading an extended Turn On Your Lovelight; overall the reviewer feels it’s not the worst performance but offers no detailed pacing analysis.
